tasks.name: Basic Initiation
tasks.hint: Promoter must be upstream (5') of the gene.

tasks.name: The Biological Brake
tasks.hint: Repressors cause steric hindrance at the operator.

tasks.name: The Inducible Switch
tasks.hint: Inducers cause a conformational change in the repressor.

tasks.name: Signal Boosting
tasks.hint: CAP + cAMP recruits RNA Polymerase more efficiently.

tasks.name: Comparing Strengths
tasks.hint: Use reporter assays to quantify promoter Vmax.

tasks.name: Distant Control
tasks.hint: Enhancers use DNA looping to contact the promoter.

tasks.name: The Silencer
tasks.hint: Silencers prevent RNA Pol from binding to the promoter.

tasks.name: Drug Sensitivity
tasks.hint: Titrate concentrations to find the minimum effective dose.

tasks.name: Combinatorial AND Gate
tasks.hint: Multiple factors interact with the mediator complex.

tasks.name: Metabolic Switching
tasks.hint: CAP-Lac dual logic handles glucose starvation.

tasks.name: Enhancer Loop
tasks.hint: Place the enhancer distally to enable DNA looping.

tasks.name: Intracellular Sensor
tasks.hint: Non-polar molecules pass directly through the membrane.

tasks.name: Relay Amplification
tasks.hint: Use a multi-step phosphorylation cascade to amplify signals.
